claims.claim: HACCP/BRC certificates and audit grades are used as supplier screening criteria.
claims.evidence: Softened from C3 to C1: The draft guest post does not claim Dingdingmiao holds HACCP/BRC. It is written as buyer due-diligence advice: 'HACCP certificates are table stakes — every export plant has one.' HACCP is standard regulatory requirement for Chinese seafood export (US FDA 21 CFR 123, EU 853/2004). BRC Grade A audit distinction is common buyer knowledge. Per governance: C3 about own certification requires evidence file, validity, applicable category — this claim is about general buyer screening practices, not own certification. Reclassified to C1.

claims.claim: Short weight or quality claim protocol: photos within 48 hours, joint survey, replacement or price adjustment options.
May 2026 Pacific mackerel 300/500g whole round IQF FOB Qingdao/Yantai: USD 800-1200/MT.
claims.evidence: pending market source evidence — web search quota exhausted this round (2/2 used). Needs verified source URL + publication date + geographic scope. Without source, draft body should soften to 'market discussions indicate Pacific mackerel in this range' or remove specific figures.

panguan_review_round3.c4_attempt: web_search round 2/2 this cycle - searched for 'Pacific mackerel 300/500g WR IQF FOB China price 2026' and 'mackerel 300-500g FOB Qingdao Yantai price'. Results show: (1) Made-in-China listing for 200-300g IQF Pacific mackerel at $900-1,500/MT FOB — close size range but B2B listing, not independent market data. (2) Various product catalog pages with no specific 2026 price data for 300/500g size. No confirmed market report or trade statistics source found for the specific claim of $800-1,200/MT for 300/500g WR IQF FOB Qingdao/Yantai.
panguan_review_round3.c4_outcome: Cannot verify after 3 rounds (6 web searches across 3 rounds). No independent market report or trade data source found for this specific price range. Per SOP: no source → keep needs_review or soften draft body to 'market discussions indicate'. Recommend guest post draft softens the specific price figure.
panguan_review_round3.recommendation: Draft body line 51: soften from exact '$800–$1,200 per metric ton' to 'market discussions indicate Pacific mackerel 300/500g WR IQF FOB prices in a range broadly above $800/MT' or remove the specific figure. Requires Ron/Zhongkui confirmation before editing draft body.

claims.claim: Dingdingmiao helps buyers source frozen seafood from China's supply chain with specifications and documents confirmed per order.

yushi_review.reason: Multiple unverified claims: C3 (HACCP/BRC certificates as screening criteria) needs_review by panguan; C2 (short weight/quality claim protocol) needs_review by zhongkui; C4 (Pacific mackerel price range USD 800-1200/MT) needs_review by panguan. Hard-stop risks: C3 certificate discussion without evidence, C4 price without source. Keep as draft_only.
blocking_gaps: C4: Pacific mackerel price range — 3 rounds of web search (6 searches) unable to verify independent source. Needs softening in draft body.

panguan_review.c3_resolution: Reclassified to C1 and verified_by_panguan. Draft does not claim Dingdingmiao holds HACCP/BRC — it is buyer due-diligence advice about general industry screening practices. HACCP is standard regulatory requirement for Chinese seafood export (US FDA 21 CFR 123, EU 853/2004). BRC Grade A distinction is common buyer knowledge. Per governance: C3 applies to own-certification claims, not buyer education content. Blocking gap resolved.
panguan_review.c4_resolution: Still needs_review. Web search quota exhausted (2/2 used this round). Pacific mackerel 300/500g IQF FOB price $800-1200/MT needs verified source URL + publication date + scope before can be used in published content. Draft body should soften to 'market discussions indicate' or remove specific figures. Blocking gap remains.
panguan_review.c2_note: Not in panguan scope. Short weight/quality claim protocol owned by zhongkui (needs Ron-approved policy).

panguan_review_round2.c4_attempt: web_search round 2/2 - searched for Pacific mackerel 300/500g WR IQF FOB China pricing 2026. Results show product listings and B2B catalog pages but no specific USD 800-1200/MT market data. No confirmed source URL found.
panguan_review_round2.c4_outcome: Cannot verify. Per SOP: no source -> keep needs_review or soften draft body to market discussions indicate. Recommend draft body remove exact 00-1200/MT figure or soften to market discussions indicate Pacific mackerel in this range.
